---
title: "Software"
---

<div class="tool-entry">
<a href="https://github.com/AcostaLab/UniAmp">
<img src="images/img_software/uniamp_logo_v8b.svg" alt="UniAmp logo">
</a>
<div class="tool-description">
<p>UniAmp (Unique Amplicon) is a computational pipeline to generate PCR primers specific to a target genome.</p>
</div>
</div>
